## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss content strategy and workflow improvements for Tribe client account](https://fathom.video/share/jzbEVSYEVN9vHwhLDzMouQFAaT1see5S?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Focus on publishing high-quality, well-researched content consistently to build traffic and authority](https://fathom.video/share/jzbEVSYEVN9vHwhLDzMouQFAaT1see5S?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)
  - [Utilize ChatGPT and other AI tools to streamline content creation while maintaining quality](https://fathom.video/share/jzbEVSYEVN9vHwhLDzMouQFAaT1see5S?tab=summary&timestamp=10.0)
  - [Improve communication and reporting to demonstrate value and progress to the client](https://fathom.video/share/jzbEVSYEVN9vHwhLDzMouQFAaT1see5S?tab=summary&timestamp=12.0)
  - [Aim to work ahead on content pipeline, planning 1-2 weeks out rather than reacting week-to-week](https://fathom.video/share/jzbEVSYEVN9vHwhLDzMouQFAaT1see5S?tab=summary&timestamp=21.0)

## Topics

### Content Quality and Production Strategy

  - [Prioritize publishing good quality content consistently over perfection](https://fathom.video/share/jzbEVSYEVN9vHwhLDzMouQFAaT1see5S?tab=summary&timestamp=134.0)
  - [Aim for "zero-shot" quality where minimal editing is needed before publishing](https://fathom.video/share/jzbEVSYEVN9vHwhLDzMouQFAaT1see5S?tab=summary&timestamp=154.0)
  - [Consider using AI tools like ChatGPT to assist with content generation and optimization](https://fathom.video/share/jzbEVSYEVN9vHwhLDzMouQFAaT1see5S?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)
  - [Focus on making content easily digestible for the target audience (CTOs, business leaders)](https://fathom.video/share/jzbEVSYEVN9vHwhLDzMouQFAaT1see5S?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Develop a consistent brand voice that's more personable and less robotic](https://fathom.video/share/jzbEVSYEVN9vHwhLDzMouQFAaT1see5S?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)

### Workflow Optimization

  - [Utilize ChatGPT Pro for content generation and refinement](https://fathom.video/share/jzbEVSYEVN9vHwhLDzMouQFAaT1see5S?tab=summary&timestamp=999.0)
  - [Consider using additional tools for plagiarism checking, fact-checking, and optimization](https://fathom.video/share/jzbEVSYEVN9vHwhLDzMouQFAaT1see5S?tab=summary&timestamp=1010.0)
  - [Aim to refresh 3-5 existing articles before adding new images](https://fathom.video/share/jzbEVSYEVN9vHwhLDzMouQFAaT1see5S?tab=summary&timestamp=2530.0)
  - [Work on developing a pipeline of content 1-2 weeks ahead](https://fathom.video/share/jzbEVSYEVN9vHwhLDzMouQFAaT1see5S?tab=summary&timestamp=1394.0)

### Reporting and Communication

  - [Provide frequent updates in the client channel to demonstrate progress](https://fathom.video/share/jzbEVSYEVN9vHwhLDzMouQFAaT1see5S?tab=summary&timestamp=2652.0)
  - [Share metrics and growth data to show impact (e.g., traffic increases)](https://fathom.video/share/jzbEVSYEVN9vHwhLDzMouQFAaT1see5S?tab=summary&timestamp=2640.0)
  - [Over-communicate on tasks completed and milestones reached](https://fathom.video/share/jzbEVSYEVN9vHwhLDzMouQFAaT1see5S?tab=summary&timestamp=2700.0)
  - [Use a consistent format for weekly updates and meeting recaps](https://fathom.video/share/jzbEVSYEVN9vHwhLDzMouQFAaT1see5S?tab=summary&timestamp=2717.0)

### SEO and Traffic Growth

  - [Current signals show some traffic growth, but more improvement needed](https://fathom.video/share/jzbEVSYEVN9vHwhLDzMouQFAaT1see5S?tab=summary&timestamp=2916.0)
  - [Focus on improving click-through rates for high-impression, low-click articles](https://fathom.video/share/jzbEVSYEVN9vHwhLDzMouQFAaT1see5S?tab=summary&timestamp=2107.0)
  - [Aim to rank for important keywords and track progress](https://fathom.video/share/jzbEVSYEVN9vHwhLDzMouQFAaT1see5S?tab=summary&timestamp=2916.0)

### Resource Allocation

  - [Considering hiring additional support (technical editor, freelancers)](https://fathom.video/share/jzbEVSYEVN9vHwhLDzMouQFAaT1see5S?tab=summary&timestamp=2170.0)
  - [Managing editors will be available to support content pods in the coming weeks](https://fathom.video/share/jzbEVSYEVN9vHwhLDzMouQFAaT1see5S?tab=summary&timestamp=2509.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Refresh 3-5 existing articles tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/jzbEVSYEVN9vHwhLDzMouQFAaT1see5S?tab=summary&timestamp=2530.0)
  - [Prepare 10 new topics for client approval](https://fathom.video/share/jzbEVSYEVN9vHwhLDzMouQFAaT1see5S?tab=summary&timestamp=2554.0)
  - [Set up consistent weekly reporting in the client channel](https://fathom.video/share/jzbEVSYEVN9vHwhLDzMouQFAaT1see5S?tab=summary&timestamp=2652.0)
  - [Investigate and potentially implement additional AI tools for content optimization](https://fathom.video/share/jzbEVSYEVN9vHwhLDzMouQFAaT1see5S?tab=summary&timestamp=1010.0)
  - [Continue to refine workflows and brand voice for Tribe content](https://fathom.video/share/jzbEVSYEVN9vHwhLDzMouQFAaT1see5S?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)
  - [Work on building a content pipeline 1-2 weeks ahead](https://fathom.video/share/jzbEVSYEVN9vHwhLDzMouQFAaT1see5S?tab=summary&timestamp=1394.0)
